feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connection ECC to CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working on a project that requires sending data (CSV) from ECC to SFTP server through CPI.

I have configured the destination in SM59 as follows:

  • Connection Type: G
  • Target URL: CPI endpoint and prefix
  • Logon & Security:
    • User: Client ID
    • Password: Client Secret
    • SSL Certificate: Default SSL Client (I have also imported the SSL certificate into STRUST)

However, when I test the connection, a prompt appears (screenshot attached) asking for a username and password. I have tried various credentials, including:

  • CPI user/password
  • Client ID/Client Secret

Unfortunately, all attempts have failed.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? I would greatly appreciate any guidance or suggestions to resolve this.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards

entry.title: Append Option for SharePoint Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a provision to append the existing file with new content using the standard Microsoft SharePoint Receiver adapter ?
currently I see the options for Default, Rename, Replace and Dynamic as Handling for Existing Files(also attached the screenshot below) but no option for "Append"
is there any workaround for this option ?

Expecting a similar functionality as we have for the standard SFTP receiver adapter with append option.

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate two different SuccessFactors instances? Not in same landscape!
entry.content:
Hello Dear Members,

I would need your inputs on this question.

My customer has a requirement to integrate two different SuccessFactors landscapes, where data for one legal entity needs to be transferred from the Parent Instance to the Child Instance via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or any other possible way.

  • Is this integration technically feasible?
  • If yes, what challenges might we face during implementation?
  • If not, are there any recommended workarounds?

Additionally, can the integration include all data (e.g., employee master data, payroll-related information, organizational structure, etc.), or is it limited to transferring only a Mini Master Data (such as Employee Profile)?

Looking forward to insights from the community on best practices or possible limitations for such an integration.

Best regards,

Siva

entry.title: It is now possible to sync Time Off Leave in SF with MS Teams Calendar. Can same be done in Slack?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

As of this release it is possible to sync Time Off status between SAP SF and MS Teams (works both ways).
Do you know if similar can be done with Slack tool as well? For SAP SF to send Time Off leave information to Slack and update status there as well for Out of office?

Thanks in advance!

Djurdja

entry.title: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing a bit of a situation - we were working on developing an integration and had deployed it last night and everything looked good.

This morning, we opened it and the Groovy Script has gone blank - it shows 0 bytes.

We tried to download from deployed and reupload from Manage Integration Content, but it still shows 0 bytes.

If anyone has any ideas on how to recover it, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Sarthak

entry.title: Parsing multipart/mixed-form data format in BTP CI
entry.content:
Dear Community,

BTP CI receives multipart/mixed-form data from OData V4 API, which requires parsing the message in case of an error. Error description appears in the multipart data response, technically  OData API call was successful,it says HTTP 200 ok.
Based upon data content received from OData, BTP CI derived whether a call has been processed successfully or not.

For that BTP CI is required to parse this message. and it is expected to read JSON structure of the error description and HTTP content text ( HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found) in the example of format,  how this will be achieved through BTP CI?

Example of Multipart/mixed data:

 --789901289D3B067293B4A5D8BC2033B80
        Content-Type: application/http
        Content-Length: 1279
        content-transfer-encoding: binary
        
        HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found
        Content-Type: application/json;odata.metadata=minimal;charset=utf-8
        Content-Length: 1097
        
        {
        "error": {
            "code": "/SCWM/ODATA_API/126",
            "message": "task item 1 doesn't exist in warehouse1.",
            "target": "$Parameter/_it",
            "@SAP__core.ContentID": "1",
            "details": {
                "message": "task 1 doesn't exist in warehouse."
            }
        }
    }

--789901289D3B067293B4A5D8BC2033B80--


Thank you in advance.

Yours sincerely,

Sateesh

entry.title: Update huge data with CPI JDBC
entry.content:
We have database table that has more than 20 million records, and create a iflow job to run daily to SELECT all records check and do some pressing then UPDATE them.

Processing all of them once not working because JDBC taking so much time for SELECT query only.

 

So, I add loop to call 10,000 records in each iteration and UPDATE them . it is working but taking time, more than 7 hours to finish 500,000 records that means to finish all records could take more than one whole day.

What is the best solution to increase the performance?

entry.title: Manual retrigger for messages flowing through TPM
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am currently working on TPM related interface for which I have encountered a message failure.

After 3 retries the message has been moved to dead letter queue, but I am unable to retrigger the message after fixing the error because the status is still in 'waiting' state. 

Getting the error "Message is not in a failed state and cannot be reprocessed" while I try to retrigger the message.

Can anyone provide me the solution on how the message can be reprocessed.

 

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: Groovy script to update incoming xml payload element
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement to replace incoming xml element values with new values, those are set as headers/properties.

Input payload:

<EDI_DC40>
<TABNAM>ORDERSHIPPED</TABNAM>
<MANDT>100</MANDT>
<DOCNUM></DOCNUM>
<DOCREL>640</DOCREL>
<STATUS>5</STATUS>
<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
<IDOCTYP>DELVRY03</IDOCTYP>
<CIMTYP/>
<MESTYP>YT_LA_WHSCON</MESTYP>
<SNDPOR>LS</SNDPOR>
<SNDPRT>DELVRY03</SNDPRT>
<SNDPRN>LS</SNDPRN>
<RCVPOR></RCVPOR>
<RCVPRT>DELVRY03</RCVPRT>
<RCVPRN>P77</RCVPRN>
<CREDAT>20240830</CREDAT>
<CRETIM>121540</CRETIM>
</EDI_DC40>

The SNDPRN and RCVPRN values need to be updated.

Output Required:

<EDI_DC40>
<TABNAM>ORDERSHIPPED</TABNAM>
<MANDT>100</MANDT>
<DOCNUM></DOCNUM>
<DOCREL>640</DOCREL>
<STATUS>5</STATUS>
<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
<IDOCTYP>DELVRY03</IDOCTYP>
<CIMTYP/>
<MESTYP>YT_LA_WHSCON</MESTYP>
<SNDPOR>LS</SNDPOR>
<SNDPRT>DELVRY03</SNDPRT>
<SNDPRN>BTP_IS</SNDPRN>
<RCVPOR></RCVPOR>
<RCVPRT>DELVRY03</RCVPRT>
<RCVPRN>ZEUABC</RCVPRN>
<CREDAT>20240830</CREDAT>
<CRETIM>121540</CRETIM>
</EDI_DC40>

Can anyone share the script to achieve the required output.

 

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: SAP CI iFlow exception as noted in SAP Note 3293244 but still processed Post Processing
entry.content: We have a production iFlow used for SFTP -> SFTP integration that experienced the "'Cannot store file' and 'cause: 4:" condition as outlined in SAP Note 3293244. We do understand what the cause of the exception was caused by and have resolved the condition. However, we discovered that the SFTP Sender adapter of the flow still triggered it's Post Processing action even though the SFTP Receiver adapter had failed with this exception. In our case it was a Delete File post processing step and we ended up loosing the file as we do not store those payloads. I'm interested to know if this is standard behavior where exceptions can occur in the iFlow and yet still allow the Post Processing to resolve? In our case it was a 'Stale File Handle' error.

entry.title: Base64 String Issues When Posting Attachments via ODataV2 API
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on uploading attachments to supplier invoices in SAP using the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration). While I successfully upload the file to SAP, I encounter an issue when attempting to open it—it appears to be corrupted. I suspect that the problem lies within the payload I am sending, specifically in how the file content is being handled.

Here is the JSON body payload I am using:

 

{
 "AttachmentContent":
  {
    "MimeType": "application/pdf",
    "Content": base64
 }
}

 



How I Generate the base64 File Content in Javascript:

 

async function fileToBase64(filePath) {
    return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
       fs.readFile(filePath, (err, data) => {
           if (err) {
               reject(`Error reading file: ${err.message}`);
           } else {
               var base64 = data.toString('base64');
               resolve(base64);
           }
       });
   });
}

 


The upload to SAP completes without errors.
When attempting to open the file in SAP, it fails, indicating that the file is corrupted or invalid.

Since the OData receiver in CPI only accepts XML payloads, I use a JSON-to-XML converter. The generated XML looks like this:(deletet the base64 string because it is too long anyway)

 

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> 
<AttachmentContentSet> 
<AttachmentContent> 
<MimeType>application/pdf</MimeType> 
<Content>Base64String</Content> 
</AttachmentContent> 
</AttachmentContentSet>

 

 I would greatly appreciate guidance on this topic.

 Thank you for your help and insights!

entry.title: How to achieve sequencing in SOAP sender messages in SAP CPI.
entry.content:
Hello CPI Experts,
We are receiving messages from SAP S/4 via SOAP Sender adapter.. SOA set up is done in S/4 system.

It is SAP sender Business partner Service used for replicating the supplier and factories.

Issue is if we receive the same message at same time with same millisecond.Duplicate suppliers are created at target system..This is one issue.

Second is target system API doesnt supports multithreading.. So messages should process in Sequence.

Receiver is http call.How to achieve this in CPI?

Regards,

Karthiga

.

.

entry.title: Is there a way to make a JAR a global resource in CPI like a Script Collection for instance?
entry.content:
Hello community members,

This is the first time I ask a question here so hopefully I'll do that correctly 🙂

My issue is that I need to reuse Groovy classes, that I build for a special purpose, in many different packages containing custom TPM Groovy mappings.  To include the pre-compiled JAR in an IFlow as local ressource is not an issue - this works very well. Today I was searching for a way to make my first JAR available as a global ressource.
The only option that allowed me to upload the library was the CPI Script Collection but this seems to allow classless JARs, containing multiple scripts, only. When I tried to run my mapping with the Script Collection added the test ended with class not found exceptions.

Does anyone know of a way to achieve my request or do I have to wait until SAP offers a way to make JARs globally available in the CPI ecosystem?

Best regards,
Mathias

entry.title: Facing issue while Decoding Base64 Encoded PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to decode a Base64 Encoded pdf in CPI with the standard Base64 Decoder but it looks like the Decoder generating faulty PDF as after saving the content as .pdf it is not opening , showing document is damaged and can't open the file.

I tried to Decode the same Base64 string on Notepad++ and saved the decoded content as .pdf. The file is opening perfectly.

Even I tried replacing the Standard Decoder with Groovy but issue still persists, Please suggest how to resolve this.

 

Regards,

Arvik

entry.title: How to trigger IDOC based on status change on Material (integration question)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to trigger an integration for Material sync in S4HANA cloud edition but only for cases when Material reaches status 71 or 72. When this happens, I'd like to send an IDOC to my integration platform.

Could you guys please let me know what are my options to do this a which option is the best? I believe I'd have to setup some sort of custom trigger in Material master?

Thank you!

Petr

entry.title: IAS/IPS: UPN in Azure and UserName in Cloud Apps
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The following problem:

As far as I know, the UPN is typically set as an email address.

In my scenario, users are provisioned from Azure -> IAS -> cloud applications.

However, when provisioning users from IAS  (for example) to Enable Now, the usernames are created as email addresses.

 

 

How can I avoid this?

For example, in Entra ID Source System, the User Name is defined in the Default Code as follows:

{
"sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName",
"targetPath": "$.userName",
"correlationAttribute": true
},

So, this means that the UPN (Azure) becomes the Login Name ( in IAS).

For example, if I map the employee ID to the username in the IPS transformation, the user is created in Enable Now with the employee ID (which would be ideal for us) as the username, but the users cannot authenticate in Azure with the employee ID.

Is there a way to change the UPN?

Or is there another solution to ensure that the usernames in cloud applications are not created as email addresses, while users can still authenticate in Azure?

Thank you very much !!!

Best regards

entry.title: [CPI-Groovy]: Sort XML Nodes based on the start date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to sort the EmpJob nodes based on start dates only when there is sinlge EmpEmployment node and jobInfoNav has multiple EmpJob nodes which contains emplStatusNav/PicklistOption/localeLabel is Active in the ascending order. Eg. I am expecting EmpJob/startDate = 2024-11-01T00:00:00.000 in the first node and then EmpJob/startDate = 2025-01-01T00:00:00.000 in the second node. The payload contains multiple records, if these conditions are not satisfied there should not be any sorting done to nodes.

I have tried with the below-mentioned code but it is not working.

Any help or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import groovy.util.NodeList
import groovy.util.XmlParser;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import java.util.Date;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Calendar;

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String);
    def payload = new XmlParser().parseText(body);
    
        payload.PerPerson.each{rec ->  
        def countofEmpEmployment = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.size()
        if (countofEmpEmployment <= 1){
            def countofEmpJob = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.size();
            def EmpJobStatus = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.emplStatusNav.PicklistOption.localeLabel.text()
            if(EmpJobStatus.contains("ActiveActive")){
            rec.value = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.sort{sd ->
                    sd.startDate.text()}
            }
        }
    } 
    message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(payload));
    return message;
}

Regards,
Pavan

entry.title: Combining multiple IDOCs into one file at the receiving end in SAP CPI.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a requirement to combine multiple idocs into one single file. It is a DESADV.DELVRY03 structure. 

So the output structure should be like;

<DELVRY03>

<IDOC Begin="1">

</IDOC>

</DELVRY03>

For my requirement, it uses Trading Partner Management and in TPM only packet size of 1 supports. So before entering TPM I have used a splitter, and at the receiver end, I have used a custom integration flow and I need to combine the IDOCs using SAP_CorrelationID. 

How is it possible to do the above requirement in SAP CPI?

Thanks,

Radhika

entry.title: Error when replicate Business Partner from S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello there,

I´m try to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer with SAP Integration Suite, but, when I´m try to replicate BP to C4C using the communication arrangement SAP_COM_0008, SAP C4C return the next error for integration:

No supported role for business partner 1xxxxxxx

Someone have any idea, how I can solve this issue?

 

Thanks,
